sales.title: Ira & Larry Goldberg Coins & Collectibles - Auction 150, Lot 591 — Vespasian, AD 69-79. Gold Aureus (7.2g) 20 mm. Mint of Rome AD 69/70. Laur. bust of the emperor facing r. Reverse: Titus and Domitian standing holding patera and roll. Calicõ 592 R-2. NGC graded VF*;
sales.description:
Vespasian, AD 69-79. Gold Aureus (7.2g) 20 mm. Mint of Rome AD 69/70. Laur. bust of the emperor facing r. Reverse: Titus and Domitian standing holding patera and roll. Calicõ 592 R-2. NGC graded VF*; Strike: 5/5, Surface: 5/5. A Premium Quality example thus the Star designation. Boldly struck with full legends on both sides. Deep rose color toning within the devices. Rare.  Estimated Value $3,000 - UP
Ex The Peter Preovolos Collection; Ex NAC O (5/2004); 1934 The Morris Collection....
